de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Interface DefaultProfileResolver

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    JavaProfileDefaultProfileResolver, JavaProfileWithPermissionsDefaultProfileResolver, SymbolicExecutionJavaProfileDefaultProfileResolver

    public interface DefaultProfileResolver
    Instances of this class are used to get a default Profile instance.

    Instances are created once via ProofInitServiceUtil.getDefaultProfile(String) and reused all the time. This means that DefaultProfileResolver are singletons and should not have a state.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Profile getDefaultProfile()
      Returns the default Profile instance.
      String getProfileName()
      Returns the profile name.

    • Method Detail

      • getProfileName

        String getProfileName()
        Returns the profile name.
        Returns:
        The profile name.

      • getDefaultProfile

        Profile getDefaultProfile()
        Returns the default Profile instance.
        Returns:
        The default Profile instance.
